message:
feat(search): enhance two-tier search service with expanded query capabilities

Improve search infrastructure for the Agent Mail system:

- Expand search_service with additional filtering, ranking modes, and
  pagination support for inbox and cross-project queries
- Add two-tier search logic for combining FTS5 full-text results with
  metadata-driven filtering for high-precision retrieval
- Improve query plan diagnostics and degraded-mode detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
